caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual diagram displayed on the screen. The diagram is a circular flowchart with various interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "developing models," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "moments," "we have a problem," "fight club," "leadership," "how people think," and "future of society." Each node is connected by arrows, suggesting a cyclical and interconnected process. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the relationships and flow between these concepts, likely discussing how they interrelate within the context of systems thinking and problem-solving. The setting suggests an educational or professional environment, possibly a webinar or online course.
